generated_exposure.exposure_text: 🚨 Did you know? While we debate alliance commitments, our adversaries are exploiting our divisions. Just last month, a coordinated cyberattack on our infrastructure went unanswered because key allies hesitated. We can't afford to wait when our security is on the line. Strong alliances aren't just about sharing burdens - they're about ensuring no one is left vulnerable. #NationalSecurity #AllianceStrong
